title: Vitebsk Heavy Rain
lead: A critical heavy rain event is affecting Vitebsk with a Z-Score of -3.00. The Score is 10.0/10, indicating an extreme anomaly.
body:
The heavy rain in Vitebsk is causing significant disruptions. 
 The HDD value of 11.5 GG and Umidita of 89% indicate a high level of moisture in the air. 
 The Vento of 10.8 km/h is relatively moderate, but the overall conditions are still critical.
